creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here's another revision of the shar.  I noticed that bin/popauth is
_never_ installed, and accordingly adjusted the Makefile and pkg-plist.
Is there a reason popauth is never installed?

Also, why can't we default many of the options to 'ON' - at least the
one's that do not involve an additional dependency on another port?

Looking forward to your feedback.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
